name: Chhole Alu
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak channa in water overnight.
2. Next morning, boil the channa with a pinch of soda and salt until tender and dry.
3. Heat 4 tbsp ghee. Add ginger and onions; fry until mixture turns limp and almond colored.
4. Add tomatoes and spices; cook until ghee separates.
5. Mash to smooth paste, add 1 cup water and jaggery; mix well and bring to boil.
6. Reduce heat and add chillies and potatoes; cook until chillies are done.
7. Meanwhile, soak tamarind pulp in 4 tbsp water until soft; squeeze out the pulp and add to channa mixture.
8. Mix well and cook until gravy thickens.
9. Remove from heat and garnish with onion rings, minced chillies, coriander, mint, and lime wedges.
